metadata.description: Checks and balances triggered when days to get paid after a sale is above industry benchmark
metadata.focus: Accelerate cash conversion, tighten credit policies, reduce long-term unpaid sales invoices, and improve collection processes

universal_controls.title: AR Aging & Automated Collection Push
universal_controls.description: Flag invoices more than 30 days overdue. Implement automated reminder sequences, escalate to collections at 45 days, and require payment plans for chronic late-payers.
universal_controls.audit_trail: long-term unpaid sales invoices report + collection activity log

universal_controls.title: Credit Policy Tightening
universal_controls.description: Reduce standard terms from net-30 to net-15. Require upfront deposits or credit card holds for new clients. Run refreshed credit checks on top 10 unpaid sales invoices.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Credit policy amendment + approval threshold log

universal_controls.title: Early-Pay Discount Incentives
universal_controls.description: Offer 2% discount if paid within 10 days and a due date of 30 days, or a discount of 1.5% if paid within 7 days and a due date of 15 days, to accelerate inflows. Track discount take-rate vs. cost of capital to ensure net positive cash impact.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Discount capture ledger + cash conversion tracker

universal_controls.title: Factoring & Receivables Financing Review
universal_controls.description: If spendable cash is constrained, evaluate non-recourse factoring for invoices  more than 60 days. Compare factor fees to revolver interest to select optimal path.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Factor rate comparison + cash advance agreement

controls.title: Milestone Billing Enforcement
controls.description: Require progress payments at fabrication, Quality Assurance (QA), and delivery stages. Halt shipments until prior milestones are settled.
controls.audit_trail: Milestone invoice log + shipment hold tracker

controls.title: Retention & Warranty Hold Tracking
controls.description: Monitor retention receivables separately. Negotiate partial release upon provisional acceptance to free trapped cash.
controls.audit_trail: Retention schedule + release negotiation log

controls.title: business-to-business (B2B) Credit Limit Reduction
controls.description: Lower credit limits for wholesale or commercial accounts showing payment delays. Shift to Cash-on-Delivery (COD) or prepaid terms until unpaid sales normalizes.
controls.audit_trail: Credit limit amendment + terms change notice

controls.title: Store-Level unpaid sales Audit
controls.description: Reconcile all commercial invoices, vendor returns, and co-op allowances. Write off uncollectible balances and tighten approval workflows.
controls.audit_trail: AR reconciliation sheet + write-off authorization log

controls.title: Upfront Retainer Enforcement
controls.description: Require 30-50% upfront deposits for new engagements. Tie billing to sprint completion rather than final delivery to accelerate inflows.
controls.audit_trail: Contract amendment tracker + deposit collection log

controls.title: Scope-to-Payment Alignment
controls.description: Halt work on out-of-scope requests until change orders are signed and billed. Track unbilled Work-In-Progress (WIP) weekly to prevent margin leakage.
controls.audit_trail: Change order repository + unbilled Work-In-Progress (WIP) report

controls.title: Corporate Account Prepayment Policy
controls.description: Require corporate clients to prepay or provide credit card guarantees for group bookings, catering, or extended stays.
controls.audit_trail: Corporate contract terms + prepayment tracker

controls.title: Daily Reconciliation & Chargeback Prevention
controls.description: Reconcile Point-of-Sale systems (POS), Online Travel Agency (OTA), and merchant deposits daily. Dispute chargebacks within 24 hours to preserve cash and reduce unpaid sales drag.
controls.audit_trail: Daily reconciliation log + dispute resolution tracker

controls.title: AIA Draw Request Acceleration
controls.description: Submit G702/G703 progress billing immediately upon milestone completion. Chase architect/lender approvals aggressively to compress payment cycles.
controls.audit_trail: Draw request log + approval tracking sheet

controls.title: Lien Rights & Notice Enforcement
controls.description: Serve preliminary notices on all projects. File mechanics liens promptly on unpaid balances to secure payment priority.
controls.audit_trail: Notice service log + lien filing registry

controls.title: Wholesale Account Prepay Enforcement
controls.description: Require grocery/restaurant clients to switch to Cash-on-Delivery (COD) or prepaid terms. Track route collection efficiency and flag chronic late accounts.
controls.audit_trail: Terms change log + route collection report

controls.title: Daily Route Settlement & Cash Handling
controls.description: Mandate daily driver settlement for cash/check invoices. Reconcile against route sheets to prevent unpaid sales buildup from field sales.
controls.audit_trail: Driver settlement log + variance investigation sheet

controls.title: Finance & Insurance (F&I) Contract Funding Acceleration
controls.description: Push lenders to fund finance contracts within 24 hours. Track 'hold' days and escalate delayed funding to protect cash flow.
controls.audit_trail: Contract funding log + hold day tracker

controls.title: Service Department unpaid sales Audit
controls.description: Audit fleet, warranty, and insurance unpaid sales separately. Submit claims within 48 hours and follow up on unpaid repairs weekly.
controls.audit_trail: Service long-term unpaid sales invoices + claim submission tracker

controls.title: Sprint Milestone Billing & Auto-Charge
controls.description: Bill upon sprint completion with automated credit card charging. Reduce manual invoicing lag and enforce terms for a due date of 15 days.
controls.audit_trail: Sprint billing log + auto-charge success rate

controls.title: Cloud Consumption Invoicing Alignment
controls.description: Pass-through cloud costs monthly with immediate invoice generation. Prevent reduction of sales from delayed client reimbursement.
controls.audit_trail: Cloud usage report + client reimbursement tracker

controls.title: Catering & Event Deposit Policy
controls.description: Require 50% deposit for all catering/event bookings. Balance due 7 days prior to event to eliminate post-service unpaid sales risk.
controls.audit_trail: Event contract log + deposit compliance tracker

controls.title: Corporate Tab Settlement Rules
controls.description: Limit corporate tabs to pre-approved accounts with net-7 terms. Require purchase order (PO) numbers and settle invoices weekly via digital payments (ACH - automatic clearing house).
controls.audit_trail: Corporate account registry + weekly settlement log

controls.title: Change Order Immediate Billing
controls.description: Bill change orders within 24 hours of approval. Do not proceed with work until client signs and submits payment.
controls.audit_trail: Change order log + payment receipt tracker

controls.title: Lender Draw Submission Tracking
controls.description: Monitor draw request submission-to-funding timeline. Chase inspector/architect sign-offs to prevent cash flow gaps between phases.
controls.audit_trail: Draw timeline sheet + approval chase log

controls.title: Insurance Claims Submission Acceleration
controls.description: Submit all third-party payer claims within 24 hours of service. Track denial rates and appeal promptly to preserve cash.
controls.audit_trail: Claims submission log + denial/appeal tracker

controls.title: Patient Payment Plan Enforcement
controls.description: Require credit card on file for payment plans. Auto-charge weekly installments and suspend services after two missed payments.
controls.audit_trail: Payment plan registry + auto-charge log

5412.title: Accounting, Tax Preparation, Bookkeeping, and Payroll Services

controls.title: Tax Extension Deposit Policy
controls.description: Require 50% deposit before filing extensions. Balance due upon return submission. No work without upfront commitment.
controls.audit_trail: Extension deposit log + balance collection tracker

controls.title: Monthly Retainer Auto-Billing
controls.description: Switch all bookkeeping/payroll clients to automated monthly billing on the 1st. Eliminate manual invoicing lag and late fees.
controls.audit_trail: Auto-bill configuration + collection success rate

controls.title: Group Block Prepayment Requirement
controls.description: Require full prepayment for group bookings  more than 10 rooms. Shift risk from post-stay invoicing to upfront cash collection.
controls.audit_trail: Group contract log + prepayment compliance tracker

controls.title: OTA Commission vs Direct Booking Optimization
controls.description: Push direct bookings via website discounts to avoid Online Travel Agency (OTA) net-30 payment cycles. Track commission lag vs. direct cash inflow.
controls.audit_trail: Channel mix report + cash conversion comparison
